summary: Apply a pending Planning integration proposal as target-branch truth.

writes.when: the requested transition mutates canonical owner lifecycle or integration truth

steps.description: Validate subject and target-authority revisions, then atomically mark the proposal integrated with owner changes and a receipt.

guards: Reject stale proposals when the affected owner or issue-relation subject revision changed.
Require a target-authority revision from the proposal or --expect-planning-revision; proposal/receipt bookkeeping is excluded from that token.
Reject apply attempts on feature branches; only target, release, and merge-queue branches may establish integrated truth.
Rollback owner, proposal, and receipt writes together on validation or write failure.
Aggregate indexes and unrelated owners remain derived or preserved.
proof: planning branch-safe tests cover guarded apply, mandatory target CAS, target branch admission, rollback surface, no-op reapply, stale proposals, and generated command exposure

ir_plan.summary: Generated targets own parser and dispatch parity while Planning owns target integration semantics.

steps.description: Validate subject and target-authority revisions, then atomically mark the proposal integrated with owner changes and a receipt.
